instructions: Create a new GitHub Actions workflow file at `.github/workflows/shellcheck.yml` to run ShellCheck on all bash scripts.
The workflow should trigger on push and pull_request to the `main` branch.
The workflow should find and execute ShellCheck against all `.sh` files in the repository.
The workflow should also execute ShellCheck against extension-less scripts in `airootfs/usr/local/bin/` (e.g., `neos-liveuser-setup`, `neos-driver-manager`).
constraints: Do not modify any existing bash scripts or production code.
Do not attempt to fix any ShellCheck warnings or errors in this run.
The scope is strictly limited to infrastructure creation (the workflow file).
